rulings.Case Title: MICHELSON VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES INC.*
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE CREATED BY DECLARATION OF MICHELSON - DEPOSITION TESTIMONY VIEWED IN ITS TOTALITY NOT CONTRADICTORY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION NEGLIGENT HIRING GRANTED, BURDEN SHIFTS, NO CONTRARY EVIDENCE RE HIRING PROCESS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION STRICT LIABILITY, INTENTIONAL TORT AND FALSE REPRESENTATION GRANTED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX LELIEVRE et al VS. SCOTT HUNTER et al
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR INJUNCTION PREVENTING USE OF EASEMENT FOR ANY PURPOSE EXCEPT ACCESS TO GARAGES AND PAD I.E. LELIEVRE MAY NOT PUT TRASH CANS OR OTHER MATERIAL ON EASEMENT AND MAY NOT HAVE SUNSET SCAVENGER PICK UP MATERIAL. DEFENDANT HAS NO RIGHT OF ACCESS TO CONCRETE PAD. DEFENDANT'S ACCESS TO PAD IS PROPERLY CHARACTERIZED AS REVOCABLE LICENSE. PLAINTIFF REVOKED LICENSE BY BUILDING FENCE. DENY HARASSMENT ISSUES TO BE RAISED BEFORE PRESIDING JUDGE OR COMMISSIONER. (PB)
